confirm.activate: के तपाईं यो निर्वाचन सक्रिय गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to activate this election?
confirm.publish: के तपाईं परिणाम प्रकाशित गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ? | Are you sure you want to publish the election results?
